column1: #mapping_set_description: "Cross-ontology mappings between the Personal Agent Ontology and W3C ActivityStreams 2.0 vocabulary for activity log interoperability."

column8: Both model agent-initiated occurrences. PAO Action requires intentionality; AS2 Activity is broader.
Both represent entities that perform activities. AS2 includes organizations; PAO focuses on AI/human agents.
PAO Encoding writes to memory; AS2 Create produces any new entity.
PAO Retrieval reads from memory tiers; AS2 Read is general content consumption.
PAO Forgetting is cognitive decay; AS2 Delete is explicit removal.
Both are deliberate removal events; PAO ErasureEvent is privacy-motivated.
PAO Consolidation transforms episodic to semantic memory; AS2 Update modifies existing objects. Weak structural parallel.
Both represent textual content in communication contexts.
PAO ToolInvocation is a specific delegation pattern; AS2 Activity is a general activity type.
PAO Conversation is a coherent dialogue process; AS2 Collection is a generic ordered group. Structural similarity only.
Both represent human individuals in activity contexts.
PAO AIAgent emphasizes autonomy; AS2 Application is generic software.
Both represent formal groups/bodies. PAO Organization is BFO-aligned; AS2 Organization is an actor type.
PAO Integration is a configured service connection; AS2 Service represents a web service endpoint. Both describe external service access.
